description: Canonical artifact registry mapping output keys to file paths, schemas, and validators. Consumed by cr-validate-round, cr-validate-stop, and cr close-round. Three tiers: L0 (canonical state), L1 (round transaction, authoritative), L2 (human-readable report).

round_phase_state.description: Per-round phase state machine with required_inputs, required_outputs, and validators per phase

loaded_knowledge.description: Global knowledge cards loaded for this round with usage contract

paper_state.description: Snapshot of current paper claims, baselines, assumptions, and risks

round_target.description: Target gap, claims, and baselines for this round

critique_ledger.description: Structured critique entries — authoritative. critique.md is a human-readable report.

critique_disposition.description: Disposition records linking critiques to patches/decisions

paper_patch.description: Paper patch proposing a draft change with before/after and claim effects

experiment_obligation.description: Individual experiment obligation spec linked to a claim-level patch

experiment_obligations.description: Round-level experiment obligation index; encodes explicit no-op with validated_patches

knowledge_delta.description: Structured YAML knowledge transaction — authoritative. knowledge-delta.md is a report.

knowledge_apply_log.description: Proof that knowledge-delta updates were written back to _cr/knowledge with before/after sha256

literature_delta.description: Updates to literature knowledge cards from this round

writing_diff_yaml.description: Structured YAML record of draft changes — authoritative. writing-diff.md is a report.

closure_report.description: Generated by cr close-round when all validators pass

thinking_card.description: Reusable thinking rule card (RP, WR, RV, AP, EP)

literature_card.description: Literature knowledge card (paper, system, concept, debate)

paper_draft.description: Paper draft with declarable section anchors

sources.description: Human-readable sources report — evidence-ledger.yaml is authoritative

writing_diff.description: Human-readable diff report — writing-diff.yaml is authoritative

research_plan.description: Research plan with questions, query classes, and success criteria

search_log.description: Log of all search queries executed with source selection

source_index.description: Index of all raw source snapshots with sha256 hashes

evidence_ledger.description: Authoritative structured evidence — each item links source and claim

raw_sources.description: Directory of raw source snapshots with content hashes

no_patch_decision.description: Structured no-op record when no paper patches were generated

validator_pipeline.description: Ordered validators executed on round close. All hard gates for paper mode.

validators.name: cr-validate-schema
validators.checks: JSON Schema compliance for all YAML artifacts

validators.name: cr-validate-artifacts
validators.checks: File presence per artifact registry and round type

validators.name: cr-validate-all-phases
validators.checks: All 14 paper workflow phases complete with timestamps

validators.name: cr-validate-ids
validators.checks: ID uniqueness within scope, pattern compliance, no dangling references

validators.name: cr-validate-research
validators.checks: Research enforcement: queries, sources, evidence, weakening evidence required

validators.name: cr-validate-source-integrity
validators.checks: Source snapshot hashes match source-index.yaml records

validators.name: cr-validate-evidence-claim-links
validators.checks: Every evidence item links to valid source and claim

validators.name: cr-validate-critique
validators.checks: Critique ledger structure: medium+ critiques have evidence_refs, high/fatal require patch

validators.name: cr-validate-anchors
validators.checks: Patch targets resolve to draft sections

validators.name: cr-validate-paper-patches
validators.checks: Dispositions present, lifecycle transitions valid, Knowledge Implication fields present

validators.name: cr-validate-experiments
validators.checks: Experiment obligation completeness or explicit no-op record

validators.name: cr-validate-patch-application
validators.checks: Applied/recorded patches have after_text in draft and writing-diff references

validators.name: cr-validate-knowledge
validators.checks: knowledge-delta.yaml content quality and apply-log writeback

validators.name: cr-validate-human-gates
validators.checks: No pending thesis-level decisions in human-review-queue.yaml

validators.name: cr-validate-paper-completeness
validators.checks: Paper draft contains all required sections and anchors
